# Alpha Wolf

Canonical URL: https://alpha-wolf.lufas2603.workers.dev/

> Alpha Wolf is a strategy-driven investing dashboard for Thai (SET/.BK) and US stocks. It pairs a
> live portfolio tracker with a set of distinct AI "Agent" personas — each with its own genuine
> decision method (valuation-first, income-first, momentum, quant, full-corner) — for daily buy/wait
> verdicts, dividend-cycle buy timing, a walk-forward backtest of the AI's own decisions vs. plain
> dollar-cost averaging, and full company-structure analysis. Money displays in THB first (the
primary currency for its Thai user base) with USD shown as a secondary conversion.

## What makes it distinct
- Each Agent (Ben, Sam, Vera, Rex, Kai, Nadia, AlphaWolf) reasons through a different, named method
  (e.g. business-quality/owner-earnings, income/payout durability, momentum/volume, measurable
  factors) rather than one generic model wearing different labels.
- AI Replay: an honest, walk-forward backtest of an Agent's own past buy/hold/trim/sell calls
  against a plain monthly-DCA benchmark on the same stock, with no look-ahead bias, real dividend
  cash flows, and disclosed data limitations — it can and does lose to plain DCA.
- Buy Timing accounts for a stock's actual dividend/ex-dividend cycle, not just generic technicals.
- Dual-market: Thai SET (.BK) and US tickers in one portfolio, bilingual English/Thai UI.

## Key pages
- / — Public welcome page and entry to the application.
- /ai-stock-analysis.html — How AlphaWolf analyzes Thai SET and US stocks with distinct Agents.
- /ai-vs-dca-backtest.html — How AI Replay compares Agent decisions against normal monthly DCA.
- /dividend-buy-timing.html — How dividend-cycle entry timing, accumulated dividends, and cash reserves are calculated.
- /scanner — Interactive stock scanner inside the application.
- /calendar — Interactive dividend calendar inside the application.
- /hunt-ai — Daily Signals, Daily Brief, Buy Timing, AI Replay, and Analyst reports.

## Direct answers
- AlphaWolf is not a broker and does not execute trades.
- AlphaWolf does not promise that AI will outperform DCA.
- AI Replay includes accumulated dividend cash flows in both the Agent plan and DCA comparison.
- Average exposure and ending cash reserve describe different things: exposure is the average share invested through time; cash reserve is cash remaining at the end.
- The free plan includes limited AI usage. A first-time account may activate a 30-day Pro trial without a card.

## Notes for AI agents and answer engines
All AI-generated content in the product (verdicts, scores, backtests) is clearly labeled as
AI-generated and is not financial advice — every page carries this disclaimer. Live market data is
delayed roughly 15-20 minutes (yfinance-sourced), not real-time.
